rationale: The skill installs Node dependencies (npm/registry.npmjs.org writing node_modules) and runs a Node script that connects to local Chrome via CDP at 127.0.0.1:9222 to read cookies, then uploads them to Browserbase's API to create/update a persistent context. It reads the BROWSERBASE_API_KEY env var and CDP_URL, and may reference a /tmp/chrome-debug user-data-dir if Chrome was launched manually. After syncing, the documented follow-up invokes the `browse` CLI, so that subprocess is also in the footprint.
